name: JOIN_COMMUTE
preconditions_or_reason: same frame/region/environment; neither side has required directional input; no hard barrier; no order or external effect

name: JOIN_ASSOCIATE
preconditions_or_reason: same constraints as R01 for all factors; dependency DAG preserved

name: FILTER_OVER_UNION
preconditions_or_reason: condition clones preserve symbols/captures; condition duplicable; same region/environment

name: FILTER_BELOW_JOIN_LEFT
preconditions_or_reason: reads(F) & ~must(A) & may(B) = empty; F pure/invocation-safe; target environment unchanged

name: FILTER_BELOW_JOIN_RIGHT
preconditions_or_reason: reads(F) & ~must(B) & may(A) = empty; F pure/invocation-safe; target environment unchanged

name: FILTER_BELOW_LEFTJOIN_LEFT
preconditions_or_reason: reads(F) & ~must(A) & may(B) = empty; F pure/invocation-safe; no change to optional condition/fallback

name: FILTER_INTO_MINUS_LEFT
preconditions_or_reason: F only observes left mapping/context; F pure/invocation-safe; RHS unchanged

name: FILTER_INTO_MINUS_BOTH
preconditions_or_reason: never legal as a generic rule; filtering RHS can remove an eliminating witness

name: LEFTJOIN_OVER_LEFT_UNION
preconditions_or_reason: R and C hygienically cloneable; no volatile/external duplicated evaluation; same region/environment

name: LEFTJOIN_OVER_RIGHT_UNION
preconditions_or_reason: never legal generically; creates one fallback per branch

name: MINUS_OVER_LEFT_UNION
preconditions_or_reason: R cloneable; no duplicated volatile/external evaluation; same independent MINUS region

name: MINUS_RIGHT_UNION_TO_SEQUENCE
preconditions_or_reason: same independent regions/environments; effect order not observable

name: MINUS_RIGHT_UNION_AS_UNION
preconditions_or_reason: never legal generically; a row removed by one branch can survive the other

name: EXTENSION_OVER_UNION
preconditions_or_reason: target fresh in both branches; same symbol/capture mapping; one call per original occurrence; no external side effects

name: EXTENSION_BELOW_JOIN_LEFT
preconditions_or_reason: reads(E) & ~must(A) & may(B)=empty; v absent from scope/may/semanticDependencies of A and B; E deterministic, side-effect-free, row-identity-insensitive

name: EXTENSION_BELOW_JOIN_VOLATILE
preconditions_or_reason: never when crossed side can multiply rows; invocation partition changes

name: IDENTITY_PROJECTION_REMOVE
preconditions_or_reason: projection is one-to-one identity; exports equal child scope; no hidden vars, rename, subquery barrier, sequence contract, construct alias

name: TRANSPARENT_SUBQUERY_FLATTEN
preconditions_or_reason: injective identity exports cover all child may-bind vars; no hidden vars/captures/group/distinct/reduced/order/slice/service/lateral/environment change

name: SUBQUERY_FLATTEN_HIDDEN
preconditions_or_reason: hidden y would leak, alter joins, MINUS overlap, SELECT *, and domains

name: SUBQUERY_FLATTEN_DISTINCT
preconditions_or_reason: duplicate elimination changes outer multiplicity

name: DISTINCT_PROJECT_COMMUTE
preconditions_or_reason: projection can collapse mappings only after the inner DISTINCT

name: PROJECT_BELOW_JOIN
preconditions_or_reason: retain output vars, every possible shared compatibility var, expression/liveness vars, and boundary exports

name: MINUS_AS_NOT_EXISTS
preconditions_or_reason: MINUS has shared-domain guard and independent RHS; NOT EXISTS is correlated

name: EXISTS_AS_JOIN_PROJECT
preconditions_or_reason: join counts witnesses; EXISTS preserves each left occurrence once

name: FILTER_OPTIONAL_CONDITION_MOVE
preconditions_or_reason: outer rejection is not optional fallback

name: SLICE_PUSHDOWN
preconditions_or_reason: slice selects sequence positions before multiplication/order is complete

name: VALUES_ASSURED_UNION
preconditions_or_reason: mustBind is intersection of row domains; declared scope is separate

name: GRAPH_BOUNDARY_CROSS
preconditions_or_reason: active graph and graph-name binding change
